notes: Game generally works good.  When viewing cards you get a purple background.  When enemies or characters have shields rotating around them they turn purple.
title: The Lord of the Rings: Living Card Game

notes:
Game either crashes on launch, or will display as running in the steam client but the window does not appear.

Suspect could be due to AMD graphics card?
title: The Lord of the Rings: Living Card Game

notes:
Didn't run for me initially, but after following this link for Vulkan support for Linux Mint 19, it appears to work perfectly :)


How to get Vulkan support on older AMD GCN cards on Mint 19:
